text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ian

Log:
  MFC r314918, r314919:

    Add the pnp id for a Wacom 'WACF00e' tablet.

    Update the comment for the Wacom WACF00e to make it clear it's not an
    accidental duplicate of WACF004.

  PR:           217306
